_doc: retired-name references replaced with plugin-scoped layout. Machine-readable I/O contract for investigating-agentforce-architecture. Orchestrator code reads this file (not SKILL.md prose) to discover the input schema, output keys, STATUS enum, and error-contract rules. The architecture skill runs inline (no subagent).
_schema_notes: 3.1 (2026-05-05) canonicalizes `invocation_type` on STANDARD_ACTION / UNKNOWN nodes in the metadata tree. Prior versions split this across `raw_invocation_type` (bundle-sourced nodes) and `raw_action_type` (flow-actionCall-sourced nodes). Both legacy keys are still tolerated by readers for one release.

org_alias.description: sf CLI alias (e.g. 'my-org-alias'). Auth is always derived via `sf org display --target-org $ORG_ALIAS --json`.

agent_api_name.description: BotDefinition.DeveloperName (e.g. 'MyAgent'). Must match the regex above; INVALID_INPUT otherwise.

agent_version_api_name.description: BotVersion.DeveloperName (e.g. 'v5'). When omitted, the agent auto-picks the Active version with the highest natural-key sort (v10 > v9); VERSION_AUTO_PICKED=true in the RESULT block.

org_id_15.description: 15-char org ID. If omitted, derived from `sf org display`.

org_id_18.description: 18-char org ID. If omitted, derived from `sf org display`.

session_id.description: Only used to name the ephemeral $WORK_DIR. Random UUID if omitted.

cache_root.description: Internal rebuildable cache root. Default: ~/.vibe/cache/investigating-agentforce-architecture. Override with --cache-dir <path>.

data_root.description: Durable user-facing output root. Default: ~/.vibe/data/investigating-agentforce-architecture. Override with --data-dir <path>.

force_refresh.description: If true, ignore cache and rewrite. Default: false.

notes: Standalone and orchestrated modes accept the same input fields; no renames.
To bypass cache, delete the cache entry or pass force_refresh: true.

output.format: Two-part return message: (1) one-line prose status, (2) blank line, (3) === RESULT === key-value block. The KV block is always LAST in the output and always present.
output.parse_rule: Find the line '=== RESULT ===', then read subsequent lines as KEY=VALUE pairs until EOF. Values are raw strings; no quoting; one pair per line.

parse_examples.python: import re; dict(line.split('=', 1) for line in output.splitlines() if re.match(r'^[A-Z_]+=', line))

STATUS.description: Terminal status. See error_contract for per-status required keys.

ERROR_DETAIL.description: Human-readable explanation on any non-OK STATUS. Sanitized (no backticks/quotes/dollar signs/newlines).

AGENT_API_NAME.description: Echo of input agent_api_name. May be empty on INVALID_INPUT if sanitize rejected before resolution.

VERSION_AUTO_PICKED.description: True iff agent_version_api_name was omitted and the agent auto-picked.

AGENT_GENERATION.description: classic = AiCopilot__ planner, nga = Atlas__ planner, unknown = anything else / not resolved.

OUTPUT_JSON_PATH.description: Durable {agent}_{version}_metadata_tree.json path under the resolved data_root.

OUTPUT_SUMMARY_PATH.description: Reserved — historically pointed at {agent}_{version}_metadata_tree.summary.md. Dropped in ; field is now always emitted empty for RESULT-block shape stability.

CACHE_HIT.description: True iff the cache was served without any Metadata API retrieves.

CACHED_AT_UTC.description: ISO-8601 UTC built-at time. On cache hit this is the age of the cached snapshot; on cold build this is the just-computed timestamp.

DEPTH.description: Max depth of the tree (BOT_DEFINITION = depth 0).

PARTIAL.description: True iff the tree is incomplete (planner unresolved OR MAX_WAVE hit). When true, STATUS=PARTIAL_OK.

AVAILABLE_BOTS.description: Comma-separated list of all BotDefinition.DeveloperName values in the org.

RESULT_BLOCK_PATH.description: Path to $DATA_DIR/last_result_block.txt — byte-for-byte tee written BEFORE stdout.

WALL_TIME_SECONDS.description: End-to-end wall-clock seconds. Two decimals. Target: 90-220s cold, <2s warm.

OK.description: Tree built, zero unresolved, planner resolved.

PARTIAL_OK.description: Tree built but planner unresolved (Bot.bot had no planner) OR waves hit MAX_WAVE=5. tree._unresolved[] explains.

INVALID_INPUT.description: agent_api_name failed [A-Za-z0-9_]+ regex, or other input validation (org_alias empty, ORG_ID_15 regex, $WORK_DIR symlink/foreign-owned).

AUTH_REQUIRED.description: `sf org display` returned nothing, or a SOQL/Metadata call failed with an auth error. Caller must run `sf org login web --alias $ORG_ALIAS`.

AGENT_NOT_FOUND.description: BotDefinition.DeveloperName not in the org. AVAILABLE_BOTS carries the CSV of what IS in the org.

AGENT_VERSION_NOT_FOUND.description: No matching BotVersion under the bot (explicit version doesn't exist, or no Active version found during auto-pick).

RETRIEVE_FAILED.description: `sf project retrieve start` failed (network, permissions, zip unreadable). ERROR_DETAIL carries the specifics.

WRITE_FAILED.description: Filesystem write failed during finalize (DATA_DIR rename, CACHE_DIR rename, or tree rewrite).

stability.key_names: Stable. Key-name changes require a NOTICE.md entry and a skill reinstall; consumers read this contract to discover the current key set.
stability.error_codes: The STATUS enum is fixed at 8 values. A new status is a breaking change for consumers that switch on STATUS.
stability.path_format: All path values are absolute (no tilde expansion required). One KEY=VALUE per line. No trailing whitespace.
stability.order: Keys inside the RESULT block appear in a stable order — orchestrators should not depend on order but may use it for human readability.
